What We Do

Our Services

✦

Permanent Eyebrows

Microblading · Ombre · Powder · Combo · Nano

Wake up with perfectly shaped brows every single morning. Each technique is tailored to your unique facial structure and skin type.

Learn More
♡

Lip Blush

Dark Neutralisation · Nude · Baby Rosy · Bold

Enhance your natural lip colour, correct dark pigmentation, and achieve your perfect pout — morning to night, effortlessly.

Learn More
◈

Scalp Micropigmentation

Hairline Restoration · Density · Full Scalp

A non-surgical permanent solution that recreates the look of hair follicles, restoring confidence for men and women.

Learn More
•

Beauty Spot Making

Classic Placement · Custom Position

A timeless, precisely placed beauty mark that adds classic elegance and a signature touch to your natural features.

Learn More
View All Services

Meet the Artist

About Mayuri

Mayuri Londhe is the founder and lead artist behind Defined MD Aesthetics — Nashik's premium permanent makeup studio dedicated to enhancing natural beauty with precision and artistry.

With a passion for detail and a commitment to safe, beautiful results, Mayuri specialises in eyebrow techniques, lip blush, scalp micropigmentation, and beauty spot making — tailored specifically for Indian skin tones.

  • Fully customised to your unique facial structure & skin tone
  • Premium pigments — safe, skin-tested, long-lasting
  • Dedicated consultation & design session before every procedure
  • Aftercare support throughout your entire healing journey
Meet Mayuri

How It Works

Your Journey to Defined Beauty

01

Consultation

We discuss your goals, skin type, and preferred aesthetic. All your questions answered.

02

Design

Brow mapping or treatment planning tailored to your facial structure. You approve before we begin.

03

Numbing

Premium topical numbing cream applied for maximum comfort throughout the procedure.

04

Treatment

The procedure is performed with precision and care using sterile, single-use equipment.

05

Aftercare

Full aftercare instructions provided. We support you through every stage of healing.

06

Touch-up

A follow-up session 4–8 weeks later perfects and locks in your results.

Authentic Client Results

Real Transformations

Every result is a real client of Mayuri Londhe at Defined MD Aesthetics, Nashik.

From sparse, undefined brows to bold, natural-looking arches.

Lip BlushDark Neutralisation
Before
After

Deeply pigmented lips transformed to a beautiful natural pink.

Lip BlushLip Blush Treatment

Stunning lip colour enhancement — side by side result.

Client Love

What Our Clients Say

“

Mayuri is an absolute artist. My brows look so natural — everyone thinks I was born with them! The whole experience was comfortable and professional.

P
Priya S.
Microblading · Nashik
“

I had very dark lips my whole life and was always self-conscious. After Mayuri's dark neutralisation treatment, my lips are a beautiful natural pink. I'm obsessed!

S
Sneha R.
Lip Blush · Nashik
“

I save so much time on my morning makeup now. My brows are perfect every single day. The consultation process was so thorough — she really listened to what I wanted.

K
Kavita M.
Ombre Brows · Nashik
“

The SMP treatment genuinely changed my confidence. My thinning hairline is no longer something I stress about. Mayuri's work is incredibly precise and natural-looking.

A
Anita P.
Scalp Micropigmentation · Nashik
“

Best decision I ever made! I've tried drawing my brows for years and never got it right. Now they're perfect. Mayuri's skill is exceptional.

R
Radha K.
Combination Brows · Nashik

Why Choose Us

The Defined Aesthetics Difference

✦

Customised to You

Every treatment is tailored to your unique facial structure, skin tone, and personal aesthetic goals.

◈

Safe & Hygienic

Single-use, sterile equipment on every client. Premium quality pigments that are skin-safe and long-lasting.

♡

Natural Results

We specialise in results that enhance your natural beauty — never overdone, always refined.

✿

Expert Artist

Mayuri Londhe brings precision, artistry, and passion to every procedure for stunning, consistent results.

◎

Consultations Included

Every appointment begins with a thorough consultation and design session. You approve everything before we begin.

✺

Aftercare Support

Full aftercare guidance provided. We're available for questions and support throughout your healing journey.
